name: Lawmatics Legal CRM and Automation API
what_it_does: Lawmatics legal CRM and automation REST API for law firms to manage client intake, automate marketing follow-up, track matters, handle e-signatures, send automated communications, and convert more leads into retained clients with law-specific workflow automation. Enables AI agents to manage contact and lead intake for legal prospect automation, handle automated follow-up and nurture sequence for law firm marketing automation, access matter and case management for legal workflow automation, retrieve e-signature document workflow for legal document automation, manage appointment and consultation scheduling for intake automation, handle document template and generation for client communication automation, access intake form and questionnaire management for client qualification automation, retrieve analytics and conversion reporting for law firm marketing analytics, manage pipeline and deal tracking for lead-to-client conversion automation, and integrate Lawmatics with Clio, MyCase, and practice management software for end-to-end legal client acquisition workflow.
use_cases: Automating client intake from law firm lead management agents
Following up with prospects from legal nurture automation agents
Managing matter pipelines from legal CRM agents
Coordinating e-signatures from legal document workflow agents
not_for: Full practice management (use Clio or MyCase for full case management)
Court filing and case management (use File & ServeXpress or PACER for court filing)
Legal billing and time tracking (use Clio or TimeSolvPay for legal billing)
best_when: A law firm wanting AI agents to automate client intake, lead follow-up, matter pipeline management, and client communication through Lawmatics' legal CRM and marketing automation platform.
avoid_when: LAW FIRM ETHICS RULES LIMIT AUTOMATION SCOPE: Legal marketing automation is subject to bar association ethics rules on attorney-client communications; automated email and SMS campaigns to legal prospects must comply with jurisdiction-specific ethics rules (CAN-SPAM + state bar rules); automated legal marketing without ethics review creates bar complaint risk. LAWMATICS IS NOT A PRACTICE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM: Lawmatics handles client acquisition but not full case management; automated law firm workflow requiring case management, billing, and court filing must integrate Lawmatics with Clio or MyCase; automated Lawmatics-only workflow for full firm operations creates gaps in case management capabilities. HIPAA COMPLIANCE FOR MEDICAL LEGAL CASES: Law firms handling medical legal matters (personal injury, medical malpractice) may receive protected health information; automated client intake for medical matters must implement HIPAA-compliant data handling; automated medical intake without HIPAA controls creates compliance violation.

auth.notes: Lawmatics uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. San Diego, California HQ. Founded 2018 by Matt Spiegel. Backed by Bessemer Venture Partners, Lytical Ventures ($37M raised). Products: Legal CRM, intake automation, email/SMS marketing, e-signatures, matter management, reporting. Integrations: Clio, MyCase, PracticePanther, Litify, DocuSign. GDPR. Serves 5,000+ law firms in US and Canada. Competes with Clio Grow and HubSpot for legal CRM.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter ($149/mo, 1 user), Pro ($299/mo, 3 users), Grow (custom, unlimited users); annual discount
pricing.notes: San Diego CA. Bessemer backed. Monthly subscription from $149/mo. 7-day trial. Annual discount.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; contact and matter queries throttled; webhooks for contact, matter, and document events

known_agent_gotchas: CONTACT vs MATTER vs LEAD OBJECT HIERARCHY: Lawmatics organizes contacts (potential clients) → leads (active prospects) → matters (retained clients); automated law firm workflow must use correct object for each stage; automated matter creation for prospect in intake creates premature matter before client retention

AUTOMATION TRIGGER TIMING FOR LEGAL FOLLOW-UP: Lawmatics automation sequences trigger based on contact activity or form submission; automated legal follow-up must configure trigger conditions correctly; automated always-send follow-up without trigger condition qualification creates message sent to all contacts regardless of inquiry stage

E-SIGNATURE DOCUMENT TEMPLATES REQUIRE PRIOR CONFIGURATION: Lawmatics e-signature document generation uses pre-configured templates with field placeholders; automated document generation must reference valid template ID; automated e-signature request without configured template creates empty document send

PRACTICE MANAGEMENT SYNC DEPENDENCY: Lawmatics Clio/MyCase integration for matter sync requires active integration configuration; automated lead-to-matter workflow spanning Lawmatics and practice management requires active sync; automated workflow assuming Lawmatics-to-Clio auto-sync without integration configuration creates missing matter in practice management system

BAR ETHICS COMPLIANCE FOR AUTOMATED LEGAL MARKETING: Automated legal marketing (email, SMS) must comply with jurisdiction-specific bar ethics rules; automated legal follow-up using generic marketing templates may violate attorney advertising rules for specific jurisdictions; automated legal marketing should implement per-jurisdiction ethics review before deployment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal CRM. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Client, matter, and legal intake data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal CRM. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Client and legal intake data.
